<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
    <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #htmx-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="htmx-logo">
        <title>htmx</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M0 13.01v-2l7.09-2.98.58 1.94-5.1 2.05 5.16 2.05-.63 1.9Zm16.37 1.03 5.18-2-5.16-2.09.65-1.88L24 10.95v2.12L17 16zm-2.85-9.98H16l-5.47 15.88H8.05Z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
